02660|             tokenMetadata?: { symbol?: string; name?: string; logo?: string; decimals?: number }
02661|             tokenPrices?: { usdPrice?: number }

02663|           
02664|           const chainId = supportedChains.find(c => c.network === tokenData.network)?.id || 1
02665|           
02666|           if (!chainData.has(chainId)) {
02667|             chainData.set(chainId, {

02669|               chainName: supportedChains.find(c => c.id === chainId)?.name || 'Unknown',

02671|               tokens: []
02672|             })
02673|           }
02674|           
02675|           const chain = chainData.get(chainId)!
02676|           const decimals = tokenData.tokenMetadata?.decimals || 18
02677|           const balance = parseFloat(tokenData.tokenBalance) / Math.pow(10, decimals)
02678|           const priceUsd = tokenData.tokenPrices?.usdPrice || 0
02679|           const valueUsd = balance * priceUsd
02680|           
02681|           chain.tokens.push({
02682|             address: tokenData.tokenAddress,
02683|             symbol: tokenData.tokenMetadata?.symbol || 'UNKNOWN',
02684|             name: tokenData.tokenMetadata?.name || 'Unknown',
02685|             balance: tokenData.tokenBalance,
02686|             balanceFormatted: balance.toFixed(6),
02687|             valueUsd,
02688|             priceUsd,
02689|             logo: tokenData.tokenMetadata?.logo,
02690|           })
02691|           
02692|           chain.valueUsd += valueUsd
02693|           totalValue += valueUsd
02694|         }
02695|       }
02696|       
02697|       const allTokens = Array.from(chainData.values()).flatMap(c => c.tokens.map(t => ({ ...t, chainId: c.chainId })))
02698|       const pnl = calculatePnl(totalValue, allTokens)
02699|       
02700|       setPortfolioData({
